sentences.arabic: شَعَرَتْ زَيْنَبُ بِأَلَمٍ فِي أَسْنَانِهَا وَلَمْ تَسْتَطِعِ النَّوْمَ.
sentences.translation: Zejneba je osjetila bol u zubima i nije mogla spavati.
sentences.translationEn: Zaynab felt toothache and could not sleep.

sentences.arabic: فِي الصَّبَاحِ ذَهَبَتْ فَوْرًا إِلَى طَبِيبِ الْأَسْنَانِ.
sentences.translation: Ujutro je odmah otišla kod zubara.
sentences.translationEn: In the morning she went straight to the dentist.

sentences.arabic: فَحَصَ الطَّبِيبُ أَسْنَانَهَا وَعَالَجَ الضِّرْسَ الْمُؤْلِمَ.
sentences.translation: Zubar je pregledao njene zube i liječio bolni zub.
sentences.translationEn: The dentist examined her teeth and treated the painful tooth.

sentences.arabic: نَصَحَهَا بِتَفْرِيشِ أَسْنَانِهَا مَرَّتَيْنِ فِي الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Savjetovao joj je da pere zube dva puta dnevno.
sentences.translationEn: He advised her to brush her teeth twice a day.
